status: Fixed in TASK-AAO-FABLE-003 (same shared write-side validator set now drives readiness)
area: Taskflow close readiness / closure packet completeness
finding: `taskflow close` dry-run reported no blocking validator work after the delivery commit, but `taskflow close --write` then failed because the closure packet was missing `validate:cli` and `validate:git-head-evidence`; those validators had to be discovered and run manually.
expectedBehavior: Dry-run/pre-close should enumerate every closure-required validator and either auto-run them or fail with the exact complete evidence plan before a write attempt.
evidenceOrRepro: Reproduced on 2026-07-12 for TASK-AAO-0166: close write returned `ATM_TASK_CLOSE_CLOSURE_PACKET_INVALID` with missing `validationPasses/validate:cli` and `validationPasses/validate:git-head-evidence`; both later passed and close succeeded.
followUp: Add a close-readiness regression proving the dry-run and write paths expose the same closure validator set and required commands.
